info.title: Project Zer Supply V2
info.description: Supply V2 is a dropship procurement platform that splits customer orders into vendor purchase orders, tracks shipments and receipts, resolves disputes, performs invoice matching, and protects every route with authentication, RBAC, and policy decisions.

tags.name: vendors
tags.description: Vendor master and vendor portal reads.

tags.name: procurement
tags.description: Purchase order reads, acknowledgement, reallocation, and cancellation.

tags.name: fulfilment
tags.description: Vendor shipment creation and fulfilment updates.

tags.name: ops
tags.description: Dead-letter replay, RBAC admin, audit, and maintenance.
